title: Acourtia oxylepis
taxonomy: Acourtia oxylepis is classified within the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Asteroideae subfamily. The Asteroideae subfamily is a large and complex group that includes many different genera, including Acourtia. Acourtia oxylepis is a member of the tribe Heliantheae, which is a group of plants that are commonly known as the sunflower tribe. Within the tribe Heliantheae, Acourtia oxylepis is placed in the genus Acourtia, which is a group of plants that are native to the Americas.
